name: graph_neighbors
description: Return the reverse-dependency (neighbor) set for ONE Bubbles governance node — which agents, scripts, and workflows depend ON it — as the unchanged JSON payload from bubbles-hub-report.sh --node (IMP-014's read-only, SST-derived governance hub composer). `node` is a script basename (e.g. state-transition-guard.sh), an agents/bubbles_shared/<x>.md shared module, or a Gxxx gate id. Output shape: {node, kind, inDegree, dependents[]} where each dependent is provenance-tagged with `source` + `line`. READ-ONLY: it adds no graph re-derivation and no network — it wraps the already-shipped, already-selftested composer via the bubbles-graph-neighbors.sh bash twin. A REAL node with no dependents legitimately returns inDegree 0 with an empty dependents[]; an UNKNOWN node (not a real script/shared-module/gate) returns a structured error. Use to see the blast radius of changing a node BEFORE you change it.

node.description: The node to look up: a bubbles/scripts[/guards]/*.sh basename, an agents/bubbles_shared/*.md module, or a Gxxx gate id.

format.description: Output format. Defaults to json (the machine-readable {node,kind,inDegree,dependents[]} payload). Use text for the human-readable form.
